summary: Mobile-first adaptation testing completed for AdminDashboard.jsx (/admin page). All 10 test features passed successfully. Fixed a backend bug in reports API (KeyError: 'username'). Mobile and desktop views verified.

fixed.issue: KeyError: 'username' - time_entries may not have username field stored
fixed.fix: Added .get() with fallback to users collection lookup

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement suggested

passed_tests.description: Compact title 'Admin' with gradient icon (40x40px) and full-width 'Gestão Entradas' button (351px width)
Horizontal scrollable tabs with abbreviated labels: Férias, Faltas, Users, Notif., Tarifas, Relat.

passed_tests.test: 3. MOBILE VIEW - Férias tab Trabalho em Férias
passed_tests.description: Cards with vertical layout and compact OK/Não buttons (140px each)

passed_tests.test: 4. MOBILE VIEW - Férias tab Pedidos Pendentes
passed_tests.description: Cards with stacked approve/reject buttons working correctly
Absence cards with compact layout visible (found 8 cards), approve/reject buttons functional

passed_tests.test: 6. MOBILE VIEW - Users tab action buttons
passed_tests.description: Stacked action buttons (Mapa, Add Entrada, Criar Utilizador) - all at x-position 29px

passed_tests.test: 7. MOBILE VIEW - Users tab user cards
passed_tests.description: Smaller avatars (40x40px) with truncated text, found 6 user avatars
6-column tabs grid (1024px width), horizontal button placement (all at y=271px)
All 6 tabs clickable and switch content correctly on mobile and desktop
Add Entrada modal opens with 356.25px width on mobile (responsive)

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 6 users, 8 absence cards, vacation work requests pending

horizontal_tabs.mobile_styling: inline-flex min-w-max gap-1 bg-[#1a1a1a] p-1 rounded-lg

ferias_tab.trabalho_em_ferias: Cards with vertical layout, OK/Não compact buttons

faltas_tab.absence_cards: Compact layout with date, hours, status badges, approve/reject buttons

users_tab.action_buttons: Stacked on mobile (full-width), horizontal on desktop
users_tab.user_cards: Smaller avatars (40x40px on mobile), truncated text

modals.add_entrada: Responsive width (356px on mobile, wider on desktop)

context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminDashboard.jsx mobile-first adaptations are fully functional. The useMobile hook from MobileContext correctly detects mobile viewport and applies responsive styling. All 6 tabs work correctly on both 375x800 and 1920x800 viewports. Fixed backend bug in /api/admin/reports/all that was causing KeyError. Minor console warning about DialogContent missing aria-describedby - accessibility improvement suggestion.

bug_fix_rca.root_cause: KeyError: 'username' in get_all_reports function - time_entries collection entries may not always have 'username' field stored
bug_fix_rca.fix_applied: Changed entry['username'] to entry.get('username') with fallback lookup to users collection if missing
